name: What are the biggest risks if I don't fix water damage quickly?

mainEntity.name: What are the biggest risks if I don't fix water damage quickly?

acceptedAnswer.text: Mold can grow within 24–48 hours, causing respiratory issues and allergic reactions. Structural damage includes weakened floors, walls, and ceilings that may collapse. Electrical hazards from water-contacted wiring can cause fires or shocks. Contaminated water spreads bacteria and pathogens. Long-term moisture leads to rot and permanent material loss. These risks make professional intervention essential. Ignoring water damage is dangerous.
acceptedAnswer.description: Risks include mold growth within 48 hours, structural collapse, electrical fires, bacterial infection from contaminated water, and permanent rot if not fixed immediately.
